description_long: This object consists of three distinct sports balls displayed side by side on individual black stands. The first ball is a classic white and black soccer ball with pentagonal and hexagonal panels. The second ball is predominantly black with elegant, curved gold lines wrapping around its surface, giving it a modern, stylized appearance. The third ball is a volleyball, featuring a pattern of blue, yellow, and white curved panels. All three balls have a glossy, smooth finish and are of similar size, suggesting standard dimensions for their respective sports. The stands are simple, flat, and black, elevating each ball slightly above the surface. The overall presentation is clean and highlights the unique design features of each ball.
description: A set of three glossy sports balls—soccer, stylized black-and-gold, and volleyball—displayed on black stands, each with distinct panel patterns and vibrant colors.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three balls side by side: soccer ball (left), black-and-gold ball (center), and volleyball (right), each on a black stand.
description_view_1: Side view with the volleyball in front, partially obscuring the black-and-gold and soccer balls behind it.
description_view_2: Rear view with the volleyball on the left, black-and-gold ball in the center, and soccer ball on the right, all visible in profile.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the soccer ball in front, partially blocking the black-and-gold and volleyball behind it.
attribute_sport-specific_markings: Soccer ball: black pentagonal and white hexagonal panels; Volleyball: blue, yellow, and white curved panels; Black-and-gold ball: gold curved lines on black surface. All markings are surface patterns typical for their respective sports.
